response:
# Lattice vs 15Five Comparison

## Pricing

| Feature | Lattice | 15Five |
|---------|---------|--------|
| **Starting Price** | ~$10-15/user/month | ~$10-15/user/month |
| **Model** | Per user, annual commitment | Per user, typically annual |
| **Free Trial** | Available | Available |
| **Custom Pricing** | Yes (enterprise) | Yes (enterprise) |

*Note: Exact pricing varies by plan tier and features selected*

## Core Features

### Lattice
✅ **Strengths:**
- Robust performance management tools
- Strong goal-setting (OKRs)
- Detailed feedback & review workflows
- Customizable templates
- Integration-rich ecosystem
- Better for larger, complex organizations

❌ **Limitations:**
- Steeper learning curve
- Can be over-featured for small teams
- Higher implementation lift

### 15Five
✅ **Strengths:**
- User-friendly, intuitive interface
- Lightweight check-ins & pulse surveys
- Strong engagement features
- Good for remote/distributed teams
- Faster deployment
- Better mobile experience

❌ **Limitations:**
- Lighter performance management tools
- Less robust goal tracking
- Fewer customization options
- Limited for enterprise complexity

## Feature Breakdown

| Feature | Lattice | 15Five |
|---------|---------|--------|
| Performance Reviews | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐ |
| Goal Management (OKRs) | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| One-on-Ones | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| Feedback & 360s | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐ |
| Engagement/Pulse Surveys | ⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| Ease of Use | ⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| Customization | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐ |
| Mobile App | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ |

## Choose Lattice if:
- You need comprehensive performance management
- Your org has complex review cycles
- You want advanced goal/OKR tracking
- Customization is important
- You have 500+ employees

## Choose 15Five if:
- You prioritize ease of use
- You need strong engagement/pulse tools
- You have a distributed/remote team
- Quick implementation is critical
- You have under 500 employees
- Budget is tight

## Bottom Line
**Lattice** = Comprehensive HR platform for enterprise
**15Five** = Lightweight, user-friendly engagement tool

Would you like me to dive deeper into specific features or help with implementation considerations?
